completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith, 1 part, web (Next.js). README claims monorepo (services/, database/) but only app/ and specs/ exist.
Existing docs: README.md, specs/*, _bmad-output SPEC. No prior docs/ index.
Tech: Next.js 15.3.8 / React 19 / TS 5.9 / Tailwind 4 / shadcn-ui / Clerk.
Conditional analysis: NO api routes, NO db/ORM, state=local React only, UI components inventoried. Data = hardcoded mocks in views.
Source tree documented with missing-folder flags.
Dev setup documented; flagged README script discrepancies (dev:web, db:init).
Architecture doc written: implemented vs planned split.
Supporting docs written: overview, source-tree, components, data-models, dev-guide.
Validated. No (To be generated) markers; API/deployment intentionally marked not-applicable-yet.

findings.technology_stack: Next.js 15.3.8, React 19.2.3, TypeScript 5.9.3, Tailwind 4.1.14, shadcn/ui, lucide-react, sonner, @clerk/nextjs 6.29
findings.key_gaps: No backend, no database (database/ missing), no API layer, no tests, no CI. Mock data only. Notifications channel unsettled (Resend vs Slack/Telegram).

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. Re-run after the database/ and services/ packages are added to capture the real backend, schema, and API contracts.
